evidence.page_title: 21 Tokyo Fashion Week Street Style Looks We Absolutely Love
evidence.title: The Street Style At Tokyo Fashion Week Is Giving Us Major Fashion Inspiration
evidence.description: All the best looks from the streets of Amazon Fashion Week Tokyo Autumn/Winter 19.
evidence.text:
ADVERTISEMENT
There's good reason why we look forward to Amazon Fashion Week in Tokyo each season and these street style looks are it. While attendees often play it safe with clean, minimalist dressing in the 'big four' (Paris, Milan, London and New York), Tokyo's streets are a riot of clashing colours, patterns and proportions.
